3042520.name: Wind Jumper
3042520.description: Wind Jumper -  is a dynamic arcade game with a side view. You control a ball flying through obstacles. By keeping the ball in the air, you throw it higher or let it fall a little. But high above and deep below there are deadly spikes, and figures are moving towards you that you need to fly around. Pills come to your help with which you can shoot at the figures and clear your path. Don't forget to collect them. Any collision results in the end of the game. And the main goal is to fly as far as possible.
